name: @ever-works/stripe-metrics-plugin
description: Stripe Metrics Plugin - Read-only Stripe business metrics (balance, gross volume) for Ever Works Goals

plugin.name: Stripe Metrics
plugin.description: Read-only Stripe business metrics — available balance and gross charge volume per day/week/month — for evaluating Goals like "$100/day balance" or "$1000/month income".

envVars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
envVars.description: Stripe secret key (a restricted read-only rk_... key is strongly recommended; can also be set via admin/user settings)
